ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artifact */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artifact */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the architecture the artifact supports */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the artifact (e.g., library, runtime) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the artifact */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is a major release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the architecture was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the architecture was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the architecture was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the release belongs to */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was made */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the release (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES release_channels ("release_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_channels" (
  "release_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release channel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the release channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release channel was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release channel was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_sizes" (
  "file_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file size */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the file size belongs to */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the artifact file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file size belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file size was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file size was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file size was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sizes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sizes_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_based_versions" (
  "version_based_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-based version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the version-based version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the version-based version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version-based version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version-based version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version-based version was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version-based version was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_based_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_based_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "same_as_originals" (
  "same_as_original_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each same-as-original */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the same-as-original belongs to */,
  "same_as_original" INTEGER /* Whether the version is the same as the original */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the version is the same as the original */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the same-as-original information was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the same-as-original information was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the same-as-original information was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("same_as_original_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_same_as_originals_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "no_assay_devs" (
  "no_assay_dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each no-assay-dev */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the no-assay-dev belongs to */,
  "no_assay_dev" INTEGER /* Whether the version is no-assay-dev */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the version is no-assay-dev */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the no-assay-dev information was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the no-assay-dev information was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the no-assay-dev information was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("no_assay_dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_no_assay_devs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_based_and_sames" (
  "release_based_and_same_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release-based and same-as */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the release-based and same-as belongs to */,
  "release_based_and_same" INTEGER /* Whether the version is release-based and same-as */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the version is release-based and same-as */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release-based and same-as information was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release-based and same-as information was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release-based and same-as information was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_based_and_same_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_based_and_sames_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, release manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the artifact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the artifact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the artifact */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the artifact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artifact_releases" (
  "artifact_release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact release */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the release belongs to */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the artifact release (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact release was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact release was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifact_releases_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifact_releases_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artifact_versions" (
  "artifact_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact version */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the artifact version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact version was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact version was soft-deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifact_versions_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifact_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
